mapper.update: UPDATE counter_orders SET incident_no = #{incidentNo}, order_date = #{orderDate}, issuer = #{issuer}, overall_deadline = #{overallDeadline}, overall_priority = #{overallPriority}, status = #{status} WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

UPDATE counter_details SET work_content = #{workContent}, person_code = #{personCode}, person_name = #{personName}, deadline = #{deadline}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, actual_hours = #{actualHours}, used_part_code = #{usedPartCode}, used_quantity = #{usedQuantity}, note = #{note} WHERE detail_id = #{detailId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM counter_details WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY seq_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE counter_details SET status = #{status} WHERE detail_id = #{detailId}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN FALSE WHEN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN status = '完了' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM counter_details WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
